title: Acceptability of Genetically Manipulated Potato Resistant to Blight 2006: Focus Group Discussion
description: The study charted the acceptability of a genetically modified type of potato, which is resistant to blight, for use in Finnish agriculture and the Finnish food market. The basis for the study were two panel discussions, where the conversation topics included the panelists' personal relationship with potato as a food item, estimations on the necessity of preventing blight, evaluations on the advantages and disadvantages of using the genetically modified potato variety, and evaluations on the mana
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
